listings.title:
109 Professional Park Dr. - Suite 200, Mooresville, NC 28117
    MAP
listings.address: 109 Professional Park Dr. - Suite 200, Mooresville, NC 28117
listings.description:
Now available for lease, this exceptional second-floor professional office suite offers approximately 4,851 usable square feet in one of Mooresville's established business parks. The thoughtfully designed layout features a welcoming reception area, numerous private offices, conference rooms, open collaborative workspaces, breakroom, and private restrooms, making it an excellent fit for a wide variety of professional office users.

The building offers elevator access, ample parking, monument signage opportunities, and convenient proximity to I-77, Downtown Mooresville, and the greater Lake Norman business corridor.

Lease rates starting at $26.00 per square foot NNN, based on a 5 year lease term.

The suite may be offered partially furnished, subject to landlord approval and the terms of an accepted Letter of Intent (LOI). Existing office furniture may be made available to qualified tenants, providing an outstanding opportunity to reduce move-in costs and accelerate occupancy.

Ideal for corporate headquarters, engineering firms, technology companies, financial services, professional services, medical administrative offices, call centers, and other executive office users seeking a highly functional, move-in-ready office environment.

For additional information or to schedule a private tour, please contact GreyRock Commercial Real Estate at (704)707-4656.

Additional Information
Lease Rate: Starting at $26.00/SF NNN (Base Rent)
Estimated 2026 CAM: $4.75/RSF
Estimated Annual CAM: $27,388.50
Estimated Monthly CAM: $2,282.38

Disclaimer: The CAM amount is an estimate based on the current operating budget and is subject to annual reconciliation and adjustment in accordance with the lease.

Furniture Option: The suite may be offered partially furnished, subject to landlord approval and the terms of an accepted Letter of Intent (LOI).

Brokerage Notice: This is a service listing for advertising purposes only. GreyRock Commercial Real Estate manages the property and provides exclusive leasing and property management services on behalf of the property owner.

listings.title:
206 E. Main St. - 206 E Main St., Rockwell, NC 28138
    MAP
listings.address: 206 E. Main St. - 206 E Main St., Rockwell, NC 28138
listings.description:
Position your business in a highly visible location along busy Highway 52 in the heart of Rockwell. This ±3,200 SF retail storefront offers exceptional exposure to steady daily traffic and strong local foot presence, making it ideal for a wide range of retail, service, or specialty commercial uses.

The interior features a large open showroom floor that can easily adapt to your layout needs, complemented by a private rear office and three restrooms — providing flexibility for customer-facing operations, staff workspace, or multi-use concepts. The building layout supports retail, boutique fitness, professional services, studio space, specialty shops, and more.

Customers and staff will benefit from convenient parking options, including street parking in front of the building and dedicated parking located behind the property for easy access and operational functionality.

Property Highlights:

-±3,200 SF retail commercial space
-Prominent Highway 52 frontage with excellent signage visibility
-Downtown location with consistent local traffic
-Large open floor plan with flexible configuration potential
-Rear private office area
-Three restrooms
-Street parking plus dedicated rear parking
-Suitable for multiple business types
-Gross Lease option available (simplified occupancy costs)

A rare opportunity to establish or expand your business presence in one of the most visible corridors serving the greater Rowan County community.

Contact us for pre-leasing details and availability timing.
